This folder vendors the browser build from abrahamjuliot/creepjs for internal
fingerprint collection.

Source runtime:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/abrahamjuliot/creepjs/master/docs/creep.js

Source license:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/abrahamjuliot/creepjs/master/LICENSE

The upstream code is MIT licensed. The CreepJS name is not used as a product
name or public mirror name in this app.

The companion creep.js file is a local worker bootstrap because the vendored
runtime expects workers to load from ./creep.js.
